Held; trimmed mean CPI above target
Held; Q1 CPI surprised to upside

news.title: ASX slides lower as tech stocks, banks and CSL fall; BHP hits record
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket finished lower ahead of budget night, amid concerns the Iran war will drag on after the US rejected Tehran’s latest peace offer.

news.title: Can changes to negative gearing and capital gains tax help you buy a home?
news.snippet: Property investors are targeted in the budget, but will it actually help future Australia? Economics writer Millie Muroi unpacks the tax changes.

news.title: ‘Easy but wrong’: Labor explains tax overhaul
news.snippet: Treasurer Jim Chalmers has explained why the Albanese government broke an election promise.

news.title: The federal budget at a glance
news.snippet: While some budgets seek to play it safe, the government is taking risks this year. Economics writer Millie Muroi explains what you need to know.

news.title: China can far outlast America over the Middle East conflict
news.snippet: In a contest of “eating bitterness” and enduring economic pain, Communist China has infinitely greater staying power than unruly, grievance-ridden America.

news.title: TMK Energy gas flow surge sparks Mongolian energy supply talks
news.snippet: TMK Energy lifted April gas production 13 per cent as talks commenced with the Mongolian government and industry groups on gas supply for the nation’s power sector.

news.title: Find out if you come out in front with the 2026 budget calculator
news.snippet: Tuesday’s budget contains a slew of tax changes and funding announcements. Find out if you come out ahead.

news.title: ‘Kaz tax’: Exiled druglord behind $15 billion budget blow
news.snippet: An staggering $15 billion budget black hole has blown the Aussie economy wide open for a chilling reason.

news.title: Federal budget: EV drivers to lose key tax break
news.snippet: Changes to the way electric cars are taxed will bring a welcome reprieve for a government looking for cash.

news.title: Larvotto hauls first antimony-gold ore as NSW Hillgrove restart nears
news.snippet: Larvotto Resources has hailed a key milestone at its Hillgrove mine in NSW, delivering the first underground ore to a surface stockpile, as plant restart remains on track for August.

news.title: True North drills deep as Qld copper study and reserves loom
news.snippet: True North Copper has completed 5800m of drilling at its Cloncurry copper project in northwest Queensland to boost resource confidence, advance first reserves and a Q4 2026 PFS.

news.title: Chalmers confirms huge tax changes
news.snippet: Australian workers have been dubbed the big winner as the government as a group slams a critical tax change.
